---
title: "White Christmas Phrase 4"
date: "2024-10-06T15:01:23"
#date-modified: "2024-10-07T16:01:23"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/les.jpg"
categories:
  - 2024
  - Les Paul
  - Fingerstyle
  - Song
  - Study
  - Christmas
  - Chord melody
---

Tempo: 0.35x\
\
**Phrase 4**\
Bar6: F∆7 B♭7 B♭9\
Bar7: C∆7 C♯ϕ F∆7 A♭ϕ\
Bar8: D♭∆13 C6


## Phrase 4 Dead Slow

{{< video https://youtu.be/68LU3zelS0Q >}}


## Phrase 4 Second Half

{{< video https://youtu.be/E_KD_92Q0c4 >}}

## Phrase 4 First Half Tempo: 0.35x

{{< video https://youtu.be/b3ouDTqED34 >}}

## Gibson Les Paul

Pickup Position: Neck\
Master Volume: 5\
Master Tone: 8

## Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 50%\
Rate: 50%

## Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 8.0\
Fat: OFF\
Treble: 6.5\
Bass: 6.0\
Middle: 6.0\
Master: 4.5\
Reverb: 5.0

## Blue Yeti

Gain: 9 o'clock\
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant

{{< video https://youtu.be/MpxE1P9fYeQ?si=p6TFe9ngW8rmvPsi >}}
